description: A reporter has returned from an assignment and needs to file an expense report to be reimbursed for travel and food costs.

nodes.task_description: Gather all receipts from the trip.

expected_outcome.value: All physical and digital receipts are collected.

nodes.task_description: Open the company's expense reporting software and create a new report.

expected_outcome.value: A new expense report is started.

nodes.task_description: Enter each expense as a line item, attaching a digital copy of the corresponding receipt.

expected_outcome.value: All expenses are logged with proper documentation.

nodes.task_description: Submit the completed report to the accounting department for approval and reimbursement.

expected_outcome.value: The report is submitted through the proper channels.
